title: Infinite Scroll and Local Dev
summary: Release 0.1.10 includes 1 new feature, 2 enhancements, 1 bug fix.

sections.label: New Features
items: Local development environment with Docker Postgres, dev scripts, and seed data

sections.label: Enhancements
items: IntersectionObserver infinite scroll on Value Screener with keepPreviousData for smooth loading
Frozen column headers for Value Screener scrolling

sections.label: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed tooltip positioning issue on Value Screener columns
